title: Exact Rational Linear Algebra Witnesses

solver_reuse.target: singular rational linear system, nullspace, and separate bad LU product-entry QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Three exact rational matrix conflicts: a singular system where x + y = 1 and 2x + 2y = 3 force incompatible scaled right-hand sides, a fixed LU product where the bottom-right entry computes to 3 but a malformed row claims 4, and a nullspace vector where A*v = 0 with first component 2 but a malformed row claims 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional linear-algebra rows only when they add distinct exact-rational matrix solver pressure such as rank, residual, nullspace, or decomposition constraints; keep general vector-space theorems in finite replay or Lean-horizon lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the matrix equations as deterministic QF_LRA formulas.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep the malformed LU finite-product replay separate from the checked QF_LRA/Farkas row for the isolated product-entry contradiction.
Keep the inconsistent linear-system and nullspace-component rows on Axeyum's checked Farkas evidence path.
Promote common exact matrix helpers into a reusable example-pack utility only after more packs need them.
